{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323164807B5F044050594B9EBE536"}"},"total":718},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7570331828434731838","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"唯一一个狠得下心来，主角直接魂穿的。不是什么唧唧歪歪的扮演系统。离道诡异仙要差一点发癫，但是写出来作者人也没救了。这是我目前见过的最好看的道诡二创。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1762608365,"group_id":"7429025199053360190","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"年纪不大，还要去上学~只要有人想看，写的东西就会更~有空的时候我就写~","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N4eEI32biLU+eymW5SFYccjwMLtHFVfWAe1oBIrI90VJ","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"2288556826962644","user_name":"第二个境界叫五耀"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2288556826962644","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7429025199053360190","book_info":{"abstract":"【斩神+道诡异仙+双穿碰撞+梦幻联动+火子哥（李火旺）+尽力有脑+反向输出+后期发糖】
阳光精神病院的李医生。
除了有林七夜和吴老狗这俩棘手的病人外。
还有一个更加让他头痛的患者。
他叫李火旺。
“哈哈，我悟了，道爷我悟了！”
“我分不清，我是真的分不清啊！”
本来就在两个世界里跑。
现在又多了个斩神位面。
他根本分不清哪个世界才是真实。
更何况，这小子不仅带着林七夜越院。
还早就阴差阳错的加入了古神教会。
最离谱的是，古神们都是李火旺的信徒！
“什么神啊仙的，没一个好东西！假的都是假的！”
“哦对，你们这群医生也是假的，都是我的幻像！”
“你们都是一丘之貉，就是惦记我是心素！”
“杀！杀！杀！杀光他们！”
“哈哈，真好，世界是疯的，这里也是疯的！”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/8b9b84e9af5b0c60b4c5309960fae079","author":"菩提是棵跳舞的树","author_id":"","book_id":"7429025199053360190","book_name":"斩神：信了！他们全都信了！","book_short_name":"道诡斩神外传","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#501820","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1.7万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":1016,"name":"男频衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1016&name=男频衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":39,"name":"二次元","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=39&name=二次元&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":538,"name":"同人","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=538&name=同人&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1062,"name":"斩神衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1062&name=斩神衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1079,"name":"衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1079&name=衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7430441333556265534","read_count":"16011","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"530352"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.0","serial_count":"232","tags":"男频衍生,穿越,二次元,同人,斩神衍生,衍生","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/8316b7768185cada23cd07976f747fe9~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779439687&x-signature=DBWj%2Bmhi7sHJ9cuxTiQRivORl24%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2897961932823027","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"17"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323164807B5F044050594B9EBE536"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读不足30分钟后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":30 已完结撒花，开放结局[送心]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1738313542,"group_id":"7429025199053360190","service_id":13,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2390773103344489"}},"expand":{"book_id":"7429025199053360190","book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"162"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读7小时后追评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":24402,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":5},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"comment_id":"7463873611004199742","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"很好看！170多章火子哥再次越狱之后，写得非常好！剧情反转地我都迷惘了，岁岁还有诸葛渊他们都来了，李火旺想把斩神世界作为代价欺骗福生天，换来道诡世界和现实世界。
作者的文笔非常的牛，前期可能显示不出来，但是后期已经开始逐渐变好了，脑洞也越来越大。
可以说作者是二代狐尾了，后期风格很狐尾。
用大千录的一些描写，还有打斗场景写的也不错，李火旺的计划非常宏大，道诡侧的众人来到这个世界之后干的事儿也是非常的令人震撼，尤其是坐忘道[大笑]
可以说这是同系列里面最好看的了！非常推荐！[送心]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1737822914,"group_id":"7429025199053360190","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"搞同人的同人女，疑似钟爱冷圈","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NwJd0Kn5pfWogxGYMhoxXYF5C5hozspxioGE7UqhM40C","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/7ed316a94b0e44c6b1c48adcf7cd54b6~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776788707&x-signature=dSWcAQ1YtJRm8%2F1LVmlcHlbWd%2BA%3D","user_id":"2390773103344489","user_name":"黑云墨雨"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2390773103344489","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1737821485,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#E4F5CD","can_worn":false,"id":3,"name":"烂尾督察员","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/972e1bec4437ce8e045aaf8e3bbfe1aa","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/47aabaca7b644a2b0eb9d35477c6d9df"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7429025199053360190","book_info":{"abstract":"【斩神+道诡异仙+双穿碰撞+梦幻联动+火子哥（李火旺）+尽力有脑+反向输出+后期发糖】
